title: Norwegian Fish Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew originating from Norway, featuring fresh fish and a blend of savory spices.
instructions: Heat the fish stock in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced potatoes and cook until they start to soften, about 5 minutes.
Add the fish to the pot and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until it flakes easily with a fork.
Stir in the heavy cream and dried dill weed.
Reduce the heat to low and let the stew simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh dill if desired.
